allow: Bash(awk 'length > 88 {print FILENAME ":" FNR ": " length "c: " $0}' src/checkpoint.py src/summarizer.py src/emailer.py src/fetchers/rss.py src/fetchers/gmail.py src/fetchers/twitter.py src/main.py)

hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit' || exit 0; ruff check src/ tests/ 1>&2 || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit blocked: ruff check failed. Fix linting errors shown above."}}'; exit 0; }; python3 -m pytest tests/ -q 1>&2; ret=$?; [ $ret -eq 0 ] || [ $ret -eq 5 ] || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit blocked: pytest failed. Fix test failures shown above."}}'; exit 0; }
